title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Verify battery life display on Device Home Screen shows correct icons and colors for different device types and charge levels, and greys out when headset is turned off.
steps: 2. Start the app and navigate to the Device Home Screen.
5. Observe the battery icons on the Device Home Screen.
expected: For Headsets: A single battery icon is shown. For Headsets with a Charge case: Two icons marked "H" and "C" are displayed. For Earbuds: Three icons marked "L", "R", and "C" are shown. Battery icon color corresponds to charge level: 100%-40% = black (white in dark mode), 39%-20% = yellow, 19%-1% = red, 0% = empty. When the headset is turned off, the battery icons are greyed out with the last known percentage displayed.
